subcodes.first_line: The Book Manifest sent down from God, the Lord of the worlds, verily it is the Living Waters of Paradise unto all who dwell in the realm of creation, and a testimony [3.5s]... ...We verily, have not fallen short of Our duty to exhort men, and to deliver that whereunto I was bidden by God, the Almighty, the All-Praised
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب مبین من لدی الله رب العالمین و انه لکوثر الحیوان لاهل الامکان و برهان
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @exhortations and counsels, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
